segments.original_text: なるほどジャストシールドされても

segments.text: with the multi-hits, should be safe
segments.original_text: この多段攻撃ならば大丈夫だろうと
先をガードさせたところを確認して掴んで

segments.text: throw into up air doesn't quite connect
segments.original_text: 投げを空上ギリギリ繋ぎ切れず

full_text: Side B Even if parried... with the multi-hits, should be safe baits the shield and grabs! throw into up air doesn't quite connect but still catches him!

corrections.original: 吹雪を空中上ギリギリ吸い寄せず
corrections.corrected: 投げを空上ギリギリ繋ぎ切れず
corrections.rule: misheard: 投げ→空上 combo context
